violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Employee did not wash hands before putting on gloves.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Cold hold unit needs door repaired.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. Hot hold and cold hold units need a cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor, walls and ceiling need cleaning . Back of equipment floors need cleaning.
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
